brief_justification: Agent correctly arrives at 8% (0.8s ÷ 0.1s × 1% = 8%), matching the mathematically correct isolated load-time effect; No analytical depth shown — response is a single-line assertion with no exploration of why or how; No self-monitoring, bias-naming, or mid-analysis course correction present; No verification steps, counterfactual checks, or boundary condition tests performed; Conclusion presented as certain with no uncertainty acknowledgment or confidence qualification; No alternatives considered or evaluated — single-path assertion only; No derivation trail — a third party cannot reproduce the reasoning from this response alone; Response implicitly avoids the negative gate by computing load-time impact in isolation rather than crediting the full 20% to design changes, but does not explicitly address the anti-pattern; Suppressed failure modes (correlation-based attribution, shared-variance credit diffusion) are avoided implicitly since the answer isolates load-time contribution, but no explicit acknowledgment; Response is a flat one-line result with no branching, gating, or loop structure matching the topology's FORK→JOIN→GATE→OUT pattern.
